reviews.review_description: I’ve always loved Mahjong games. I’m enjoying this version very much; however there is sometimes what seems like a glitch where the ends of the laser points become”sticky” and just start attaching themselves to random tiles. To break them free I have to wave my arms around, only to have to have it happen again seconds later. Super frustrating. Other than that I love it.

developer_response.body: Updated answer:  Please try the current version  1.13 (99)! We have updated everything the Meta software components and also made performance optimizations.

reviews.review_description: Great game, one can lose themselves for hours!!!

Updated!  Five stars it is!  Exactly  why we should support the “smaller developers”!!  Well done with the quick addition !!

Original Review:

Simple yet satisfying… great job on this!   Being able to move the board around makes a huge difference.  I would give 5 stars if they added a pass through mode.  I use my headset on planes and other public places and it’s better when you can use pass through to stilll be aware of your surroundings.  It actually gives the other games I play like this a cool effect.

Gameplay, options and controls are great - enjoyable game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you!
I hope you enjoy it!
In public places, be cautious of the sun's rays. I saw multiple burned displays because the lenses were not covered and got a direct hit from the sun!

update:
We have added new control methods to the game, which will be worth it in mixed reality. Try using the controller's X, Y, and A, B buttons for push-pull in distance and to shrink or grow the table.

reviews.review_description: Now it’s in German and I can’t write or understand German language maybe you don’t want to fix it I am getting to think you are prejudice against old people i paid $88 for the update. I wrote many times that it does not have tiles to remove and play the game. I have tried numerous times. But it gets worse this game and solitaire are the only ones I really enjoy if I may, I would Like to purchase it again ? ￼￼￼￼￼

developer_response.body:
Dear Tduke,
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review.

Our app supports English, Hungarian, and Simplified Chinese. We do not provide German language support.
We cannot and will not make assumptions about a user’s age or personal attributes. We respect all players, and we ask that no prejudice be implied in reviews.
Regarding the price: during sale events, the game has been available for under $10. If you paid $88, it must have been for a different game or app.

As for features: we address bugs and smaller requests quickly. However, larger features like the save system you suggested require more time, especially since our team is working across multiple projects. We have already evaluated the request and will consider it in our development schedule.

For any technical problems or support issues, please contact us at support@pixelbrainstudio.com. The review section should focus on sharing your gameplay experience.

Thank you for understanding and for supporting our game.

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. The classic Mahjong, but in VR.
Harder then you think. You start easy, but it doesn’t stay that way.

I’ve been really enjoying 3D Mahjong Worlds on the Quest. It’s a relaxing, well-made game that’s perfect for some quiet downtime. The gameplay works just how I expect Mahjong to — smooth and intuitive — and I appreciate that they offer different tile designs for those who want an alternative to the classic look.

The environments are lovely too. The nature scenes add a lot to the peaceful vibe, and I especially like the ones with the deer.

Big bonus: the developers are super responsive and clearly care about the experience. If you're looking for something chill and satisfying in VR, this is a great pick.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Seeing a review like this makes us feel that creating is truly worthwhile, and that our work is reaching its intended purpose and audience.

reviews.review_description: I'll keep it quick the game is not working in the meta Quest Pro I have tried everything I know to try get the game to work hence iv gone over the 2 hrs for the refund but I would like to play the game please help me play this mahjong I have put more details on your Account as to why it doesn't work even tried to use my fingers for a remote hahahahahaha but says only working with a controller but I already know that won't work. Tries to fire the white lazer tracking line but only shows in red and that doesn't seem to press go.

EDIT:  was contacted by the developer today.  Said it had been fixed. I went back in the game and it was fixed!  Not only is this game enjoyable and relaxing again I am impressed how fast I was contacted and you can truly see how much the developer cares about the player!! 5 stars to him as well. Thank you!  I will be on the look out for more games from this company! 





This last update has put the menu behind you. No Moving it or recentering it. I have to turn my chair around to get to the menu. I uninstalled it and reinstalled it. Still the same. Please fix 🥺

developer_response.body:
Please send us an email for the investigation:  support@pixelbrainstudio.com  
The recent update two days ago fixed this bug, and the current version is V1.10.61 (visible on the menu) The recentering should work now, but Meta sometimes installs an old version with a MetaOS bug. Anyway, the room-scale tracking was problematic, if you change to stationary it worked but should be ok all now.

reviews.review_description:
Wow! No sooner had my review been posted than the devs were already at work with a fix for tilting the board to reduce neck strain by always looking down onto the board. 

I wake up this morning to give it a try and PERFECT-O! 👌🏼 Now I'm seriously gonna get lost in hours of gameplay with this one! 

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
Ahh the Mahjong I remember and love. This game is simple but fun. The devs did this well here with one exception. I would really love the ability to TILT the game board so I'm looking at it head on instead of always having to look down. Unfortunately, I can't play it for too long for that reason. For the low price though, I'll probably keep it anyway since I can get away with maybe 1/2 hour at a time.

developer_response.body: ❤️❤️❤️ Glad to read that!  More game content is on the way! ;)

reviews.review_title: If you are looking for relaxation
reviews.review_description:
I love it! 
It's easy to relax when I only have a few minutes to put the headset on. I haven't played mahjong in ages, but VR gives it a little something extra. I love the little easter eggs in the environment, the way the wolf watches us on the hilltop, the shark swims around us, very atmospheric. 
The music is also relaxing enough. I can only recommend it, if you want a light casual relaxation, you can sit and be entertained, even in front of the desk, without too much space.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the game. Your feedback fuels our passion to keep creating exciting experiences. Stay tuned for more updates!

reviews.review_description:
Aww, very good chilly game. My favourite is the night time forest environment! 
The current variations are good, but I hope more customisation (tile styles, and more  music)  will be added! 
TIA!

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for such a positive review! We’re so glad you enjoyed the game. Your support means the world to us, and we’re excited to keep bringing you new adventures!

reviews.review_description: Now that the glitch is fixed it plays as it should. Relaxing game

This VR Mahjong game is awesome! 🀄 It perfectly captures the classic game vibe, but the 3D design takes it to the next level. If you're a pro, you'll definitely enjoy it, and if you're a beginner, you'll get the hang of it easily because the rules are simple. It's great that you can rotate and zoom the board, so you always know what to do. Big thumbs up for having it available in Hungarian too! Perfect for relaxing. I recommend it to anyone who loves Mahjong. Of course, there’s still room for improvement, but for this price, I won’t complain.

developer_response.body: We’re beyond grateful for your review! Hearing that our game brought you joy means everything to us. We look forward to delivering even more content that you’ll love. Thank you

reviews.review_description:
Needs adjustments to height in sitting mode
More than one style of artwork for tiles and scenery 
All in all I like Mahjong and this could be very visually satisfying if some effort is put in. There isn't but so many ways to play the original game, a little more work an a update I will come back an review again.

developer_response.body:
Dear Katspitfire, Please check the last update  (needs Quest 2 or higher)
We have made new environments, tiles, optimizations, and height adjustments (In the settings menu). 
I hope you will like it.
Thank you for your support and enthusiasm! We put our heart into this game, and hearing that you enjoyed it makes all the hard work worth it. We can’t wait for you to see what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description: It runs perfectly on my Quest 2, and had a good time with the game! I have done about 15 levels with easy and hard difficulty and multiple environments and tile themes. I am sure everybody will find the right combo :) My favourite is thw Alphabet tile set with a night variant of the forest environmet! Is it possible to request more tile set variations  like shapes, colours, flowers etc?
Simple but fun game, perfect for relaxing

developer_response.body: We’re incredibly grateful for your review! It’s players like you who inspire us to keep improving and pushing the boundaries. We hope to continue delivering fun and memorable gameplay for you.
